scripts.dev: pnpm infra:up:deps && pnpm db:doctor && pnpm infra:up:apps && pnpm dev:ui
scripts.dev:no-mobile: pnpm infra:up:deps && pnpm db:doctor && pnpm infra:up:apps && pnpm --filter @mvp/web-admin dev
scripts.infra:up: bash scripts/env/verify-cloud-sql-proxy-prereqs.sh && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d cloud-sql-proxy redis api worker
scripts.infra:up:deps: bash scripts/env/verify-cloud-sql-proxy-prereqs.sh && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d cloud-sql-proxy redis
scripts.infra:up:apps: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d api worker
scripts.infra:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f --tail=100 cloud-sql-proxy redis api worker
scripts.test: NODE_ENV=test bash scripts/guards/ensure-safe-test-db.sh && turbo run test
scripts.checks:all: pnpm gcp:check && pnpm env:check && pnpm db:doctor && pnpm checks:fast
